# Requirement: OR-001

- Title: Automated GitHub Pages deployment
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall deploy automatically to GitHub Pages via a deterministic GitHub Actions workflow, with observable deployment logs including artifact provenance and commit SHA.

## Rationale

Manual deploys introduce inconsistency and increase rollback risk. Every approved merge must be deployable through a repeatable and auditable pipeline.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Workflow builds static site and publishes to gh-pages.
- Pages source is configured to GitHub Actions.
- Deployment logs include artifact provenance and commit SHA.

## Success Metrics

- Deployment success rate >= 95% over first ten release runs with observable logs.

## Non-Goals

- Blue/green deployments, multi-environment release orchestration.

## Constraints

- No generated output committed to main; deployment artifact generated in CI.
